name: Digital Brands Group, Inc.
business: Digital Brands Group sells a curated collection of five lifestyle apparel brands (Bailey 44, DSTLD, Stateside, Sundry, Avo) through direct-to-consumer websites, wholesale channels (specialty stores and department stores), and royalty/license revenue.
sellsTo: wholesale partners such as specialty stores and department stores

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio currently consists of five brands that leverage our three channels: our websites, wholesale and royalty (license revenue).
Our products are sold direct-to-consumers principally through our websites and our own showrooms, but also through our wholesale channel, primarily in specialty stores and select department stores.
